sections.paragraph:
Original: שׂיח

Transliteration: śı̂yach

Phonetic: see'-akh

BDB Definition:

  1. meditation, complaint, musing
    1. plaint, complaint
    2. following are dubious
      1. musing
      2. anxiety, trouble
      3. talk

Origin: from H7878

TWOT entry: 2255a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
